steps.title: Find the logical requirement
steps.content: The “but” and “find out” signal that the blank should contain the question the researchers want to answer about consumer preference.

steps.title: Match the sentence form to its punctuation
steps.content: Direct questions require inverted word order (do consumers...) and a question mark. B has both: inverted word order plus question mark. A falsely claims we know consumers prefer simplicity, while C and D mismatch word order with punctuation. That matches choice B — B is correct.
